mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, questionnaire_id, question_no, content, question_type, options_json, scoring_rule_json, sort_order, required_flag, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM questionnaire_question WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_question ( tenant_id, questionnaire_id, question_no, content, question_type, options_json, scoring_rule_json, sort_order, required_flag ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{questionnaireId}, #{questionNo}, #{content}, #{questionType}, #{optionsJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{scoringRuleJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{sortOrder}, #{requiredFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_question SET questionnaire_id = #{questionnaireId}, question_no = #{questionNo}, content = #{content}, question_type = #{questionType}, options_json = #{optionsJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, scoring_rule_json = #{scoringRuleJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, required_flag = #{requiredFlag} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
